integration_validation_v2.evidence: search.rs:1396 record_ai_tag_suggestion (status='proposed', PG tx + EventLedger), :1497 decide_ai_tag_suggestion (accept/reject guard on status='proposed'), :1567 apply_ai_tag_suggestion (must be accepted; inserts real tag); test atelier_core_data_tests.rs:6495 proves proposed-not-auto-applied, rejected-cannot-apply, accept->apply->tag, joins kernel_event_ledger and uses count_events_for_aggregate against the real EventLedger, and verifies raw decision reason is redacted to a ref hash in the ledger payload

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
